role_delineation_check: SW handles the selection of the HHA and negotiates the single-case agreement for the out-of-network insurance. PN audits Atlantis data against the face sheet, verifies family sentiment, and flags network barriers to the SW while educating the family on transition expectations.
demographic_audit_note: Audit of Atlantis queue against facility face sheet revealed a discrepancy in the primary phone number for Arthur's daughter (POA); Atlantis had digits 4 and 5 transposed. Insurance verified as Aetna Medicare Advantage.
home_vs_ltc_goal: Home with family support; SW confirms patient is not an LTC candidate at this time despite Parkinson's progression.
weekly_staff_update: Week 1: SW reports Arthur's UTI is cleared, but PT notes gait instability. Week 2: SW identifies that the preferred local HHA is out-of-network for Aetna; single-case agreement request initiated by SW.
v_card_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into daughter's phone for Caller ID recognition; program flyer delivered to Arthur's bedside.
pre_dc_pulse_call: Reached Arthur's daughter; she reports high anxiety (Sentiment Score: Anxious) regarding managing Arthur's Parkinson's medications at home while waiting for the HHA. PN flagged this sentiment to the SW.
atlantis_final_sync: D/C date entered for Friday; 1st MA visit date entered for Saturday in Atlantis following SW confirmation of HHA acceptance.
ma_visit_booking: MA visit booked for Saturday morning only after the Atlantis portal showed the HHA status changed to 'Accepted' with a Saturday Start-of-Care (SOC) date.
narrative_summary: PN audited the patient's record and corrected a transposed phone number in Atlantis to ensure contact with the POA. The primary barrier was an Insurance-HHA Network Mismatch, which the PN flagged to the SW for resolution. PN verified the family's 'Anxious' sentiment regarding medication management and educated them on what to expect during the first 24 hours at home. Success was achieved by waiting for the SW to confirm HHA readiness before scheduling the MA visit.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis demographic audit reveals transposed digits in POA contact number.
SW reports preferred HHA is out-of-network for Aetna Medicare Advantage plan.
Arthur's daughter expresses high anxiety about managing Parkinson's gait instability at home.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient has Aetna Medicare Advantage and the nearest HHA is out-of-network.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the insurance mismatch to the SW in Atlantis and documented the need for a single-case agreement.

format_2_triples.situation: Arthur's daughter is worried about when the nurse will arrive on the first day.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the daughter on the Day 1 window and how to recognize the Healing Partners caller ID.

format_2_triples.situation: Need to confirm if the HHA is actually going to show up on Saturday.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Verified the HHA acceptance status and SOC date in the Atlantis portal.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Monitor the Atlantis portal for updates from the Social Worker regarding the insurance negotiation and wait for the HHA status to turn green.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This respects the SW boundary by allowing the professional licensed for vendor and insurance negotiation to handle the mismatch without PN interference.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Verify the Aetna policy ID in Atlantis, flag the network gap to the SW, and educate the family on why the discharge date might shift while the network agreement is finalized.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This uses Liaison verbs to ensure data accuracy and manage family expectations without contacting the insurance company or HHA directly.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the HHA's intake coordinator to ask if they can expedite the single-case agreement with Aetna so the patient can discharge on time.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This violates the No-Vendor Rule and the Verb Filter by attempting to 'negotiate' and 'coordinate' logistics with an HHA intake department.
